response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS and Docker, aligning strongly with the required stack. He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and internal tooling, and his open-source contributions and teaching background demonstrate strong engineering discipline and communication skills. His only minor gap is limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, though his broad testing and framework experience compensates.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and internal tooling development
Strong advocacy for testing, DevOps, and knowledge sharing via open-source and workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume (though equivalent frameworks used)
German language skill is only basic, may hinder local collaboration
Some roles involve legacy tech (DLang, Ember.js); need confirmation of current focus
